# llms-full.txt — Mind Centre for Learning (Complete)
# All page URLs with descriptions for AI model ingestion

## Core Pages

- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg): Home — Premier Singapore tuition centre. PSLE, O-Level, A-Level tuition in Serangoon, Bedok, Bishan.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/about](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/about): About — Our story, founders David & Violet Lim, teaching philosophy, Critical Mind-Focused Learning.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/teachers](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/teachers): Teachers — Qualified tutors for English, Math, Science, Chinese, GP, Economics, POA.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/learning-system](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/learning-system): Learning System — Fast & Systematic study methodology. Memory techniques, mind mapping, problem-solving.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/results](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/results): Results — Student achievements: PSLE AL1-3, O/A-Level A's. 5 medical school entrants.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/schedules](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/schedules): Schedules — Class timetables for primary, secondary, JC levels. Weekday and weekend slots.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/testimonials](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/testimonials): Testimonials — Parent and student reviews. 4.9★ rating.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/contact](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/contact): Contact — Blk 265 Serangoon Central Drive #04-267, Singapore 550265. +65 9740 2024.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/enroll](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/enroll): Enroll — Registration form. Trial class signup.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/franchising](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/franchising): Franchising — Tuition centre franchise opportunities.
- [https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/blog](https://www.mindcentre.com.sg/blog): Blog — 197+ education articles. Study skills, math tips, science concepts, exam strategies.
